input.title: User prefers dark roast coffee
input.content: I always go for dark roast when I can find it. Light roast just doesn't do it for me.

input.title: User lives in Portland
input.content: I live in Portland, a city in the Pacific Northwest known for its rain and coffee culture.

input.title: User enjoys hiking
input.content: I love going on hikes, especially in mountainous areas. Weekend hikes are my favorite way to unwind.

input.title: User works as a graphic designer
input.content: I'm a graphic designer. I work mostly with Figma and Illustrator.

input.title: User likes mystery novels
input.content: I read a lot of mystery fiction, particularly classic whodunits and noir detective stories. Agatha Christie and Raymond Chandler are favorites.
